programs.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt
programs.sub_title: Fortifying a Family in Fort Pierce
programs.desc: In order to give its family a place to stay connected as it grows and moves away, a couple searches for a beachfront home in Fort Pierce, Fla.

programs.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt
programs.desc: After marrying on Daufuskie Island, a family of eleven wants to find a place where it can visit, relax and enjoy the beach.

programs.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt
programs.desc: A man from Vancouver, Canada, has planned to live on the beach since he was a teenager, and now searches for a place in Rio Hato, Panama.

programs.title: Island Hunters
programs.desc: Georges and Mike travel a lot for work and only get to settle in at home for a few months out of the year, so they're looking to move out of the cold climate of Canada.

programs.title: Island Hunters
programs.sub_title: Catering to Tourists on Lake Nicaragua
programs.desc: After falling in love with the beauty of Lake Nicaragua almost a decade ago, UK native Gemma decided to start her own touring company in the region with her business partner Scott.

programs.title: Food Paradise
programs.desc: From slow-smoked bison ribs in Colorado to chicken wings topped with cinnamon sugar and icing in Rhode Island, hunting down proteins that satisfy every carnivorous craving.
